event: View of Santa Maria della Salute, Venice
description: A view of the entrance facade and steps of the Baroque church of Santa Maria della Salute in Venice. The grand stone staircase leads up to the portico with its Corinthian columns and statuary niches. The building's pale stone facade fills most of the composition. At the lower right, a dark gondola is moored at the water's edge. The painting captures the play of light and shadow on the architectural surfaces with loose, confident brushwork in muted creams, grays, and warm tones.
